visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in an outdoor paved plaza with a man and a woman. The man is wearing a white jersey with the number "22" and an orange cap, while the woman wears a blue and white striped shirt and shorts. They are standing close together, looking at the camera and talking with high energy and expressive hand gestures. (2) The scene shifts to close-up shots of the man yelling excitedly towards the camera. Bold yellow and white text overlays appear on the screen. The woman reacts with a big smile and enthusiastic nods, her hair moving as she gestures with her hands clasped together. The background shows large city buildings, red lanterns, and a festive atmosphere. (3) They walk through a decorative green and yellow archway featuring Pokemon symbols. The camera pans across a grassy area to show multiple large inflatable Pokemon figures, including Pikachu, Chikorita, Tepig, Totodile, and a large Pokeball. (4) The pair visits a game demonstration booth. A person is seen playing a video game on a large screen mounted on a black stand. The screen displays gameplay from "Pokemon Legends: Z-A." The man gestures broadly toward the screen, explaining the features of the trial while the woman looks on with interest. (5) They are then shown playing the game themselves, holding controllers and focusing on the screens with bright smiles. The background includes other attendees and festival tents under bright daylight. (6) The duo poses for a photo with a person in a Pikachu mascot costume. This Pikachu is unique, wearing a green jacket and a black fedora hat. They all make "peace" signs and smile brightly for the camera. (7) They move to a section with traditional night market games. The woman is seen throwing a ball at a "Nine-Grid" target, and they are shown participating in ring toss and a cup-sliding game on themed tables. (8) In the final segment, the man and woman kneel on the artificial grass in front of the inflatable Pokemon. They hold up promotional brochures and sticker sets, showing them closely to the camera while delivering a final call to action with high energy.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 來啦洪+0我問你啦. (2) [Slogan]: 喜不喜歡寶可夢. [Subtitle]: 喜歡. (3) [Slogan]: 喜不喜歡逛夜市. [Subtitle]: 超喜歡. (4) [Slogan]: 喜不喜歡蔡宗翰. [Subtitle]: 還好. (5) [Logo]: 台北101水舞廣場. [Slogan]: 《寶可夢傳說 Z-A》夜市祭. (6) [Logo]: 寶可夢傳說 Z-A. [Slogan]: Nintendo Switch 2 Edition. [Subtitle]: 可以現場免費試玩. (7) [Subtitle]: 免費的哦. [Slogan]: 最新寶可夢 Switch 2 免費試玩. (8) [Subtitle]: 來了來了!! (試玩結束). [Logo]: Thank you for playing. (9) [Subtitle]: 欸不行啦 它試玩有時間 趕快這要買吧 我跟你講 旁邊也可以買 直接遊戲買回去 自己玩就好了 走 這邊還有很多限定活動哦 快點快點. (10) [Subtitle]: 欸! 一樣 一樣 欸 是穿《寶可夢傳說 Z-A》主角服裝的皮卡丘!!! 是本人欸. (11) [Subtitle]: 大朋友小朋友最喜歡的皮卡丘, 可以近距離合照, 一定要好好把握. 這邊還有台灣經典的夜市遊戲攤位, 有5攤哦. (12) [Slogan]: 九宮格. [Slogan]: 乒乓球. [Slogan]: 套圈圈. [Slogan]: 推杯子. (13) [Subtitle]: 你只要完成其中的3項挑戰, 就能獲得限量紀念貼紙哦. (14) [Slogan]: 就能獲得限量紀念貼紙. [Subtitle]: (學超像). (15) [Subtitle]: 活動只到10月19號哦, 趕快揪你的訓練家好朋友們, 一起來台北101的水舞廣場, 一起來參加《寶可夢傳說 Z-A》夜市祭吧! (16) [Slogan]: 《寶可夢傳說 Z-A》夜市祭.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main characters, 1 mascot, and approximately 12 people in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The man wears a white jersey with orange numbers and an orange baseball cap. The woman wears a blue and white striped long-sleeve shirt and matching shorts.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An outdoor city plaza at Taipei 101 with modern skyscrapers, red lanterns, festival booths, and large inflatable Pokemon figures on artificial turf.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-pitched, high-arousal male vocal delivery. He speaks at a very fast rate with an excited, welcoming tone. Background music is a high-tempo electronic pop track with a strong 4/4 beat and bright synthesizer textures. There is faint outdoor ambient noise. (2) A transient "Whoosh" SFX occurs as the man asks a series of rhythmic questions. His volume increases to a shout. The female speaker responds with a bright, joyful, high-pitched voice. The BGM remains consistent in volume and energy under the dialogue. (3) New phase triggered by a "Ding" SFX and a shift in the male speaker's prosody to a narrative style. He describes the location while the BGM continues its upbeat loop. Faint sounds of crowd murmur and distant city traffic are audible. (4) A transition SFX leads into game-specific audio. Sharp, percussive sound effects from a video game UI and character cries are clearly heard. The male voice maintains a high dominance and excitement level. The speech-music overlap is continuous. (5) Incidental noise of plastic balls hitting a table and ceramics-like clinking sounds occur during the game booth segment. The male narrator's speech rate remains fast. A "Pop" SFX highlights the woman's reaction to the rewards. (6) The final phase features both speakers talking in unison with high vocal arousal and positive valence. The music swells towards a bright cadence. A final "Whoosh" SFX marks the end of the promotional announcement.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Intro -> Event Tour -> Product Demo -> Activities -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves to promote the 'Pokemon Legends: Z-A' Night Market Festival event at Taipei 101. It uses a high-energy, vlog-style approach to showcase various attractions, including game demos, mascot interactions, and traditional night market games to encourage public attendance.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly names and showcases the product (Pokemon Legends: Z-A) and associated Nintendo hardware as the central theme of the event.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-production value social media vlog utilizing energetic hosts and fast-paced editing to drive engagement for a brand event.
